Metadata.title: Kauan Kelvin — Frontend Developer
Metadata.description: Portfolio with interactive 3D, 100 Lighthouse performance and bold design. Built to be remembered.

About.title: WHO AM I ?
About.p1: My name is Kauan Kelvin, I'm 20 years old and I'm passionate about learning new technologies. Currently, I'm a Software Engineering student at Unicesumar, focusing on Back-end Development.
About.p2: I have practical experience with Java, React, TypeScript, Python and Node.js, as well as front-end knowledge. My goal is to transform challenges into scalable and secure solutions, delivering clean code focused on performance and maintaining robust systems.
About.quote: It's not just about code, it's about solving problems elegantly and efficiently.

AboutModern.p1: My academic journey in Software Engineering provided the theoretical foundation needed to build robust systems. Today, I focus on transforming this theory into scalable applications using Java and the JavaScript ecosystem.
AboutModern.p2: I work as a Freelance FullStack Developer, tackling real business challenges from SQL database modeling to creating high-performance React dashboards.
AboutModern.philosophy_text: Delivering value through clean, secure, and performant code.

AboutCyber.backend_p1: My focus is on developing systems that don't just work, but can handle the load. I use Java and Spring Boot to create secure and efficient APIs, always thinking about scalability.
AboutCyber.backend_p2: The terminal you saw symbolizes my constant quest for automation and efficiency. From Python scripts to Linux deployments, I always seek total control over the ecosystem where my code runs.
